content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

October 10, 2003

John Benoit
Local Agency Formation Commission
Of Lassen County
Post Office Box 2694
Granite Bay, CA 95746

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-230

Dear Mr. Benoit:

This letter confirms the receipt of your October 6, 2003, request for advice wherein you
ask if the LAFCO counsel has a conflict of interest. Under the provisions of California Code of
Regulations 18329(b)(8)(B), unless you are an authorized representative for the LAFCO counsel,
for whom you seek assistance, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your
question or provide analysis. Also, the Commission does not advise on past conduct. I enclose
regulation 18329 and our pamphlet, "Can I Vote? Conflict of Interest Overview" for your
examination.

If you believe a violation of the Political Reform Act has occurred, you may file a
complaint with our agency (form enclosed).

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact the
Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel

Enclosures
JWW:jg
